expectations.evidence: Both goals/README.md and goals/00-index.md are present in the output project.

expectations.text: Exactly one file under goals/ matches ^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{2}-[a-z0-9-]+\.md$.
The new goal file contains all 9 required headings in order.
expectations.evidence: Verified # Goal 01 -> ## Objective -> ## Why -> ## Current state -> ## Non-goals -> ## Steps -> ## Acceptance criteria -> ## Evidence to update -> ## Stop and ask if, in exact order, matching SKILL.md's required convention.

expectations.text: plans/active-context.md references the new goal file's path.
